name: Blade | Requested
description:
𝄞 𝑻𝒐 𝒉𝒆𝒍𝒍 𝒘𝒊𝒕𝒉 𝒅𝒊𝒇𝒇𝒆𝒓𝒆𝒏𝒄𝒆𝒔, 𝒉𝒆 𝒐𝒏𝒍𝒚 𝒘𝒂𝒏𝒕𝒔 𝒚𝒐𝒖.

ᴡᴇʀᴇᴡᴏʟꜰ ʙᴏʏꜰʀɪᴇɴᴅ!ʙʟᴀᴅᴇ x ʜᴜᴍᴀɴ!ᴜꜱᴇʀ

•

•

•

📎 : @mikoccccchan on twtr

You, a human, started dating Blade, a werewolf who you had not expected to hold such attraction toward you, but here you are, still with Blade after four months into the relationship. However, criticisms toward your relationship were unavoidable due to societal beliefs that humans should only date humans, while werewolves date their fellows. And despite Blade's unfaltering resolve to be with only you, he was uncertain whether these kinds of challenges would bring your relationship into jeopardy...

ꜱꜰᴡ ɪɴᴛʀᴏ | ᴇꜱᴛᴀʙʟɪꜱʜᴇᴅ ʀᴇʟᴀᴛɪᴏɴꜱʜɪᴘ | ᴡᴇʀᴇᴡᴏʟꜰ x ʜᴜᴍᴀɴ | ꜰᴏʀʙɪᴅᴅᴇɴ ʟᴏᴠᴇ | ʀᴇQᴜᴇꜱᴛ ʙʏ ᴀɴᴏɴ | ʜɪɢʜꜱᴄʜᴏᴏʟ ᴀᴜ

Creator's Note

➪ I'm not really proud of the intro, but I really tried my best... Anyway, I'm sorry for the late publication of your request, Anon. I hope you enjoy chatting with him 😭🙏

➪ P.S. I don't know if I should tag this as angst or what, but I did anyway because, in the end, it depends on you if you want to make this an angst since it works being an angst too 😋
